other_observers: Nick Moore, Ali Iyoob, Matt Daw, Joel Such; We were the original finders.
description: Phalarope-build. Long, thin, black bill. White throat. Rufous-red nape. Top of head dark. Chest gray. Back/wings rufous and gray. Flanks white with darker streaks. Undertail coverts clean white.Behaviors: During the time we watched this bird, all it did was feed in the middle of the pond, twirling about in typical phalarope fashion.Call: Did not vocalize.Plumage: adult, alternate
